title: build_request clones Vec<String> on every call
description: build_request() calls chat_using().to_vec() on every JMAP method invocation, heap-allocating a Vec<String> with two owned String values each time. The OnceLock caches initialisation but not the clone. JmapRequest.using is Vec<String>, so the clone is mandatory under the current type. All 27 build_request call sites across chat, message, contact, misc, custom_emoji, space_ban, and space_invite modules are affected. Fix: change JmapRequest.using to Cow<'static, [&'static str]> or Arc<[String]>, or add a separate internal request path that borrows the static slice directly. Impact: O(1) per call but two heap allocations per JMAP round-trip; measurable in tight polling loops (SSE reconnect + changes + get = 6+ gratuitous allocs per cycle).
close_reason: decision: build_request clones two short string literals per call; the allocation cost is negligible and adding indirection (Arc, OnceLock<Vec>) would complicate the code more than it saves
